data.content: Shipment review approved: origin/main is at commit 725010d71aee, rollbackBeatState now invokes 'kno rb' in src/lib/memory-manager-commands.ts, coverage assertions match, all knot commit tags are present with commit: short hashes, and GitHub Actions workflows CI, Changesets, and Coverage Badge completed successfully for this commit.
